vocab.sentence: Patrick is considering buying a Happy Meal to get the free toy.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 派翠克正在考慮買快樂兒童餐來獲得免費玩具。

vocab.sentence: Alisa usually takes breakfast into consideration when she chooses a hotel.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 艾莉莎選擇飯店時通常會將早餐納入考慮。

vocab.sentence: The red button in the public toilet is for dangerous situations only.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 公廁裡的紅色按鈕僅供危險情況使用。

vocab.sentence: Irene tends to choose a window seat when she takes a plane.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 艾琳搭飛機時往往會選擇靠窗的座位。

vocab.sentence: The Christmas event was fun, so it attracted large crowds of people.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這場聖誕活動很有趣，所以吸引了大批群眾。

vocab.sentence: The daily job of some social workers is to check on how poor families are doing.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 一些社會工作者的日常工作是查看貧困家庭的狀況。

vocab.sentence: The earthquake occurred suddenly and scared my parents.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 地震突然發生，嚇到了我父母。

vocab.sentence: This set lunch includes a main dish and a drink.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這份套餐包括一份主菜和一杯飲料。

vocab.sentence: Certain behavior is not allowed in the race, including hitting others.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 比賽中不允許某些行為，包含打別人。

vocab.sentence: Michael made a gesture to tell his team member to shoot the ball.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 麥可做了一個手勢告訴他的隊員投籃。

vocab.sentence: If a popular YouTuber promotes our product, our sales increase rapidly.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果受歡迎的 YouTuber 推廣我們的產品，我們的銷售量會迅速增加。

vocab.sentence: The rapid change in the weather made me catch a cold.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 天氣的迅速變化讓我感冒了。

vocab.sentence: I don't feel like eating out tonight. Besides, I spent too much money this month.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我今晚不想在外面吃。此外，我這個月花太多錢了。

vocab.sentence: It is surprising that the singer plays the role of a clown in the new TV drama.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 令人驚訝的是，這位歌手在新電視劇中扮演小丑的角色。

vocab.sentence: Sherry came for her favorite dessert at the café. Unfortunately, it was not open.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 雪莉來這家咖啡館吃她最喜歡的甜點。不幸地是，它沒開。

vocab.sentence: Daniel was fortunate to earn a free set of LINE stickers.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 丹尼爾很幸運地獲得了一組免費的 LINE 貼圖。

vocab.sentence: Eating too many instant noodles can be harmful to health.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 吃太多泡麵可能對健康有害。

vocab.sentence: The hurtful comments on Rita's blog did harm to her feelings.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 麗塔部落格上的傷人評論對她的感情造成了傷害。

vocab.sentence: The young singer is under a lot of pressure to perform in the big show.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這位年輕歌手在大型演出中承受著很大的壓力。

vocab.sentence: The island is isolated by oceans, so we need to go there by boat.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這座島嶼被海洋孤立，所以我們需要搭船去那裡。

phrases.sentence: Ted loves to read books for fun. In contrast, I play video games.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 泰德喜歡看書當作消遣。相比之下，我打電動。

phrases.sentence: Ian chose the cool shoes rather than the comfortable ones.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 伊恩選擇了酷炫的鞋子而不是舒適的鞋子。

phrases.sentence: Winnie is very nervous because she is going to travel on her own.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 溫妮非常緊張，因為她要獨自旅行。

phrases.sentence: New York City is commonly known as the Big Apple.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 紐約市通常被稱為大蘋果。

phrases.sentence: Kelly sticks to her habit of getting up early every day, even on weekends.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 凱莉堅持她每天早起的習慣，即使在週末也是如此。

tips.label: 基本句型 1
tips.text: S + V + so + Adj / Adv + that + S + V

tips.label: 基本句型 2
tips.text: N (先行詞) + who / which / that + V ...

notes.title: so + Adj / Adv + that ... (如此...以至於...)
notes.rule: so 是副詞，後面必須緊接形容詞 (Adj) 或副詞 (Adv)，用來強調程度。that 所引導的子句用來表達因為前面的程度而造成的「結果」。
notes.description: 用來表達某事物程度極高，進而產生了某種結果。
examples: The weather changed so rapidly that we had to cancel our picnic.
The rain was so heavy that we all got wet.
The dog appeared so suddenly that I was scared to death.

notes.title: 關係子句 (主格關係代名詞 who / which / that)
notes.rule: 當先行詞是「人」時，關係代名詞用 who 或 that；當先行詞是「物」或「動物」時，關係代名詞用 which 或 that。在子句中作主詞時，動詞單複數必須與先行詞一致。
notes.description: 關係代名詞用來代替前面的名詞（先行詞），並引導出一個形容詞子句來修飾該名詞。
examples: I prefer to watch dramas that / which have happy endings.
Andrew lost the hat which was given by Sharon.
A crowd of people who gathered in the square were there for the event.

quiz.question: The weather changed ____ rapidly that we had to cancel our picnic.
quiz.hint: 空格後接副詞 rapidly，且後面有 that 引導結果子句，必須使用 so...that (如此...以至於...) 句型。

quiz.question: The rain was so heavy ____ we all got completely wet.
quiz.hint: so + adj. + that... 句型中，用 that 引導表示結果的子句。

quiz.question: The dog appeared so suddenly ____ I was scared to death.
quiz.hint: so suddenly (如此突然) 後方須接 that 引導結果子句。

quiz.question: Technology is developing ____ rapidly that we must keep learning new things.
quiz.hint: 修飾副詞 rapidly 並與後方 that 連用，表示程度極高導致的結果，需用 so。

quiz.question: The new TV drama was so popular ____ almost everyone in my class watched it.
quiz.hint: so popular 後需接 that 帶出結果。

quiz.question: The Christmas event was ____ fun that it attracted large crowds of people.
quiz.hint: fun 在此作為形容詞，搭配後方的 that 子句，需使用 so 來修飾。

quiz.question: The island is so isolated by oceans ____ we need to go there by boat.
quiz.hint: so isolated (如此孤立) 後接 that 引導出結果。

quiz.question: The hurtful comments were ____ harmful that they caused her great pain.
quiz.hint: 搭配後方的 that 子句，必須選 so 來修飾形容詞 harmful。

quiz.question: Daniel was so fortunate to earn free stickers ____ he jumped with joy.
quiz.hint: so fortunate (如此幸運) 後接 that 引導結果子句。

quiz.question: The young singer felt ____ pressured that she started to cry backstage.
quiz.hint: 修飾形容詞 pressured 並與後方 that 連用，需選 so。

quiz.question: The coffee was so hot ____ I burned my tongue.
quiz.hint: 固定句型 so + adj. + that + 子句，用 that 帶出結果。

quiz.question: He ran ____ fast that nobody could catch him.
quiz.hint: fast 為副詞，後面有 that 引導結果，需搭配 so。

quiz.question: The math test was so easy ____ everyone got a high score.
quiz.hint: so easy 後方需用 that 引導結果子句。

quiz.question: The noise was ____ loud that I couldn't hear what the teacher said.
quiz.hint: 搭配後方 that 子句，修飾形容詞 loud 需用 so。

quiz.question: The boy was so tired ____ he went to bed early.
quiz.hint: so tired (如此疲累) 後方以 that 引導結果子句。

quiz.question: The food was ____ delicious that I ate three bowls of rice.
quiz.hint: delicious 為形容詞，有 that 結果子句跟隨，需用 so。

quiz.question: He was so angry ____ he left without saying a word.
quiz.hint: so angry 後方需接 that 引導結果。

quiz.question: The room was ____ dark that I couldn't see anything at all.
quiz.hint: 修飾形容詞 dark 且後方有 that 子句，需填入 so。

quiz.question: The story was so sad ____ it made everyone in the theater cry.
quiz.hint: so sad 後面接 that 子句表達導致的結果。

quiz.question: The music is ____ loud that it hurts my ears.
quiz.hint: 搭配 that 子句，修飾 loud 須用 so。

quiz.question: The earthquake occurred so suddenly ____ my parents were scared.
quiz.hint: so suddenly 搭配 that 引導結果子句。

quiz.question: The box was ____ heavy that she couldn't lift it on her own.
quiz.hint: heavy 為形容詞，搭配 that 結果子句，前方需用 so 修飾。

quiz.question: The weather is so cold ____ we have to stay indoors and keep warm.
quiz.hint: so cold 後方以 that 引導結果。

quiz.question: She sings ____ well that people think she is a professional star.
quiz.hint: well 在此為副詞，修飾動詞 sings，搭配 that 子句需用 so。

quiz.question: The soup is so hot ____ I have to wait for it to cool down.
quiz.hint: so hot 後面需搭配 that 引導結果。

quiz.question: I prefer to watch dramas ____ have happy endings.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 dramas 為事物，在關係子句中作主詞，關係代名詞需用 which 或 that。

quiz.question: A crowd of people ____ gathered in the square were there for the event.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 A crowd of people 為「人」，在關係子句中作主詞，關係代名詞需用 who。

quiz.question: Andrew lost the hat ____ was given by Sharon yesterday.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 the hat 為事物，關係代名詞可用 which 或 that，選項中僅 that 正確。

quiz.question: The teacher ____ teaches us English is very nice and patient.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The teacher 為「人」，在關係子句作主詞，需填 who。

quiz.question: I bought a new phone ____ has a great camera.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 a new phone 為事物，關係代名詞需用 which。

quiz.question: The girl ____ is making a gesture in the center is my sister.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The girl 為「人」，在關係子句作主詞，需填 who。

quiz.question: The book ____ is on the desk belongs to Mary.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The book 為事物，需用 which 引導關係子句。

quiz.question: The man ____ called you to explain the situation yesterday is my uncle.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The man 為「人」，且在子句中擔任動詞 called 的主詞，需用 who。

quiz.question: The dog ____ bit me last week is very dangerous.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The dog 為動物，關係代名詞可用 which 或 that，選項中僅 that 合適。

quiz.question: The car ____ hit the tree in the accident was completely destroyed.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The car 為事物，需用 which。

quiz.question: The students ____ study hard will eventually pass the difficult exam.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The students 為「人」，在關係子句中作主詞，需用 who。

quiz.question: The train ____ goes to Taipei leaves at eight o'clock daily.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The train 為事物，在子句中作主詞，需用 which。

quiz.question: The woman ____ wears a red dress is a famous writer.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The woman 為「人」，需用 who。

quiz.question: The watch ____ was stolen yesterday was a very expensive gift.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The watch 為事物，需用 which 引導。

quiz.question: The boy ____ broke the window ran away rapidly.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The boy 為「人」，需用 who。

quiz.question: The bus ____ goes to the train station is coming.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The bus 為事物，關係代名詞可用 which 或 that，選項僅 that 合適。

quiz.question: The people ____ live in this small town are known to be very friendly.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The people 為「人」，需用 who。

quiz.question: The birds ____ sing in the morning wake me up every day.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The birds 為動物，需用 which。

quiz.question: I like the doctor ____ treated my illness last year.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 the doctor 為「人」，在子句中作動詞 treated 的主詞，需用 who。

quiz.question: The social workers ____ check on poor families do a great job daily.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The social workers 為「人」，需用 who 引導關係子句。

quiz.question: The gesture ____ means 'stop' is very clear to everyone.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The gesture (手勢) 為事物，需用 which。

quiz.question: The situation ____ makes him nervous is speaking in public.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The situation (情況) 為事物，可用 which 或 that，選項僅 that 符合。

quiz.question: The YouTuber ____ promotes our product is very popular online.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The YouTuber 為「人」，在子句中作主詞，需用 who。

quiz.question: The clown ____ performed in the TV drama was very funny.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The clown (小丑) 為「人」，需用 who。

quiz.question: The disease ____ spreads rapidly is very harmful to the public.
quiz.hint: 先行詞 The disease (疾病) 為事物，需用 which。

vocab.sentence: Patrick is considering buying a Happy Meal to get the free toy.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 派翠克正在考慮買快樂兒童餐來獲得免費玩具。

vocab.sentence: Alisa usually takes breakfast into consideration when she chooses a hotel.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 艾莉莎選擇飯店時通常會將早餐納入考慮。

vocab.sentence: The red button in the public toilet is for dangerous situations only.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 公廁裡的紅色按鈕僅供危險情況使用。

vocab.sentence: Irene tends to choose a window seat when she takes a plane.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 艾琳搭飛機時往往會選擇靠窗的座位。

vocab.sentence: The Christmas event was fun, so it attracted large crowds of people.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這場聖誕活動很有趣，所以吸引了大批群眾。

vocab.sentence_chinese: 一些社會工作者的日常工作是查看貧困家庭的狀況。

vocab.sentence_chinese: 地震突然發生，嚇到了我父母。

vocab.sentence: This set lunch includes a main dish and a drink.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這份套餐包括一份主菜和一杯飲料。

vocab.sentence: Certain behavior is not allowed in the race, including hitting others.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 比賽中不允許某些行為，包含打別人。

vocab.sentence: Michael made a gesture to tell his team member to shoot the ball.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 麥可做了一個手勢告訴他的隊員投籃。

vocab.sentence: If a popular YouTuber promotes our product, our sales increase rapidly.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 如果受歡迎的 YouTuber 推廣我們的產品，我們的銷售量會迅速增加。

vocab.sentence: The rapid change in the weather made me catch a cold.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 天氣的迅速變化讓我感冒了。

vocab.sentence: I don't feel like eating out tonight. Besides, I spent too much money this month.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我今晚不想在外面吃。此外，我這個月花太多錢了。

vocab.sentence: It is surprising that the singer plays the role of a clown in the new TV drama.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 令人驚訝的是，這位歌手在新電視劇中扮演小丑的角色。

vocab.sentence: Sherry came for her favorite dessert at the café. Unfortunately, it was not open.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 雪莉來這家咖啡館吃她最喜歡的甜點。不幸地是，它沒開。

vocab.sentence: Daniel was fortunate to earn a free set of LINE stickers.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 丹尼爾很幸運地獲得了一組免費的 LINE 貼圖。

vocab.sentence: Eating too many instant noodles can be harmful to health.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 吃太多泡麵可能對健康有害。

vocab.sentence: The hurtful comments on Rita's blog did harm to her feelings.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 麗塔部落格上的傷人評論對她的感情造成了傷害。

vocab.sentence: The young singer is under a lot of pressure to perform in the big show.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這位年輕歌手在大型演出中承受著很大的壓力。

vocab.sentence: The island is isolated by oceans, so we need to go there by boat.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 這座島嶼被海洋孤立，所以我們需要搭船去那裡。

phrases.sentence: Ted loves to read books for fun. In contrast, I play video games.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 泰德喜歡看書當作消遣。相比之下，我打電動。

phrases.sentence: Ian chose the cool shoes rather than the comfortable ones.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 伊恩選擇了酷炫的鞋子而不是舒適的鞋子。

phrases.sentence: Winnie is very nervous because she is going to travel on her own.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 溫妮非常緊張，因為她要獨自旅行。

phrases.sentence: New York City is commonly known as the Big Apple.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 紐約市通常被稱為大蘋果。

phrases.sentence: Kelly sticks to her habit of getting up early every day, even on weekends.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 凱莉堅持她每天早起的習慣，即使在週末也是如此。

grammar.sentence: The movie was so boring that I fell asleep.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這部電影太無聊了，以至於我睡著了。

grammar.sentence: He ran so fast that nobody could catch him.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他跑得如此快，以至於沒人能抓到他。

grammar.sentence: The soup is so hot that I can't drink it now.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這湯太燙了，以至於我現在無法喝。

grammar.sentence: The box was so heavy that she couldn't lift it.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個箱子太重了，以至於她搬不動。

grammar.sentence: The weather is so cold that we have to stay indoors.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 天氣太冷了，以至於我們必須待在室內。

grammar.sentence: The test was so easy that everyone got a high score.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 考試太簡單了，以至於每個人都拿了高分。

grammar.sentence: She sings so well that people think she is a star.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 她唱得如此好，以至於人們以為她是明星。

grammar.sentence: The noise was so loud that I couldn't hear the teacher.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 噪音太大了，以至於我聽不到老師的聲音。

grammar.sentence: The boy was so tired that he went to bed early.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 男孩太累了，以至於他很早就上床睡覺了。

grammar.sentence: The food was so delicious that I ate three bowls of rice.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 食物太美味了，以至於我吃了三碗飯。

grammar.sentence: He was so angry that he left without saying a word.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 他太生氣了，以至於一句話也沒說就離開了。

grammar.sentence: The room was so dark that I couldn't see anything.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 房間太暗了，以至於我什麼都看不見。

grammar.sentence: The story was so sad that it made everyone cry.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這個故事太悲傷了，以至於讓大家都哭了。

grammar.sentence: The math problem was so hard that many students failed.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 這道數學題太難了，以至於很多學生都不及格。

grammar.sentence: The music is so loud that it hurts my ears.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 音樂太吵了，以至於讓我的耳朵很痛。

grammar.sentence: The girl who is dancing in the center is my sister.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 在中間跳舞的那個女孩是我妹妹。

grammar.sentence: The book which is on the desk belongs to Mary.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 在書桌上的那本書是瑪麗的。

grammar.sentence: The man who called you yesterday is my uncle.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 昨天打電話給你的那個男人是我叔叔。

grammar.sentence: The dog that bit me last week is very dangerous.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 上週咬我的那隻狗非常危險。

grammar.sentence: The car which hit the tree was completely destroyed.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 撞到樹的那輛車全毀了。

grammar.sentence: The teacher who teaches us history is very strict.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 教我們歷史的老師非常嚴格。

grammar.sentence: The house that stands on the hill is very old.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 矗立在山丘上的那棟房子非常古老。

grammar.sentence: The students who study hard will pass the exam.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 努力讀書的學生會通過考試。

grammar.sentence: The train which goes to Taipei leaves at eight.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 開往台北的火車八點出發。

grammar.sentence: The woman who wears a red dress is a famous writer.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 穿著紅色洋裝的女人是一位著名的作家。

grammar.sentence: The watch that was stolen yesterday was very expensive.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 昨天被偷的手錶非常昂貴。

grammar.sentence: The boy who broke the window ran away quickly.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 打破窗戶的男孩很快地跑走了。

grammar.sentence: The bus which goes to the train station is coming.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 開往火車站的公車來了。

grammar.sentence: The people who live in this small town are very friendly.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 住在這個小鎮的人非常友善。

grammar.sentence: The birds that sing in the morning wake me up every day.
grammar.sentence_chinese: 每天早上唱歌的鳥兒會把我叫醒。
